chinese_news.title: 硬氪首发|moody前高管搭档大疆骨干入局陪伴机器人，锦秋领投，融资数千万
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，AI-Native科技潮玩品牌ZuzuZoos查无此园（杭州多蓝艾梦智能科技旗下）近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，锦秋领投、上海复容跟投。此次融资将主要AI大模型迭代、硬件产品扩建、IP生态深化、全球市场拓展、核心团队扩容。

ZuzuZoos成立于2025年，聚焦“AI陪伴机器人+AI潮玩”。创始人董晓楠是前摩根士丹利投资银行分析师，曾任新消费独角兽企业moody事业部总经理，任职期间拉动GMV从2亿元增长至10亿元。硬件负责人是前大疆清扫机器人机械结构负责人，深耕机器人及智能硬件领域15余年，主导多款机器人研发与落地。IP设计团队来自泡泡玛特、迪士尼等IP大厂，AI团队来自智谱等头部大模型公司。

当下，陪伴机器人赛道已经涌入大量玩家，许多公司追求“更聪明”，董晓楠表示，ZuzuZoos更在意如何让AI角色真正为用户提供情绪体验，于是选择了一条差异化路径：不只是把AI机器人做成“会聊天的电子宠物”，而是尝试把AI、潮玩与IP世界观结合，创造一个有“活人感”和持续生命力的硅基伙伴。

“潮玩的底色本就带有反叛精神，消费

chinese_news.title: 安踏发布“折纸科技”，试图从结构设计寻找跑鞋缓震新方向
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，6月16日，安踏在上海创新创意设计研究院发布全新跑鞋技术平台“折纸科技（ANTA FOLD）”，并同步推出首款搭载该技术的跑鞋产品折纸H1。

过去十余年，运动鞋行业的创新主要围绕材料展开。从EVA、TPU到Pebax等高性能发泡材料，各大品牌持续通过中底材料升级提升缓震与回弹表现。近年来，随着材料性能逐渐接近瓶颈，越来越多品牌开始将研发重点延伸至结构设计领域，希望通过几何构型优化进一步释放性能空间。

安踏此次推出的“折纸科技”，正是这一趋势下的最新尝试。

根据安踏介绍，该项目由安踏创新实验室联合牛津大学、天津大学及浙江大学相关研究团队共同研发。与传统依赖材料软硬度实现缓震不同，折纸科技试图利用特定折叠结构实现受力形变与能量管理，从而构建一套新的中底缓震方案。

其核心思路源于折纸工程学（Origami Engineering）。

作为一门融合数学、材料学与结构力学的交叉学科，折纸工程近年来已被广泛应用于航空航天、机器人、医疗器械等领域。通过特定的折叠几何结构，材料能够在有限空间内实

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 两轮电动车没有天花板，爱玛黑翼要用AI与硬核科技赢得年轻男性的心
chinese_news.summary: 国内两轮电动车市场正悄然迎来一场深层次的“基因突变”。长期以来，大众对两轮电动车的认知被牢牢框定在“代步工具”与“大众精品”的传统叙事里。然而，在四川省体育馆的一场发布会上，爱玛正式发布了旗下专为年轻男性打造的极速运动品类品牌——“爱玛黑翼”（AIMA BLACK WING）。首位中国F1车手周冠宇化身“全速领航员”在线助力，爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版以及爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款硬核新品集结亮相。这场动作透露出的创投信号再明显不过：在女性和基础通勤赛道筑牢绝对壁垒后，传统头部巨头爱玛正以一种颠覆性的姿态，正式向年轻男性性能与运动电摩赛道发起总攻。36氪通过与爱玛科技集团三位核心高管的深度专访，试图拆解两轮电动车从功能代步全面迈向体验升级的下半场逻辑，看他们如何锚定Z世代的硬核社交货币，打破行业所谓的“天花板”。

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 纯粹热爱的城市探索玩家而来 ，爱玛黑翼三大新车集结亮相
chinese_news.summary:
6月17日，爱玛黑翼品牌战略发布会在四川省体育馆盛大开启。体育馆化身爱玛黑翼玩家街区，潮流青年齐聚现场。爱玛黑翼以“全速热爱”为品牌主张，携爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版、爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款车型重磅亮相，首位中国F1车手周冠宇以爱玛黑翼“全速领航员”身份在线助力品牌发布。爱玛黑翼的登场，标志着爱玛电动车在男性出行科技领域树立起全新坐标，正式构建起“他硬核”增长格局，向“时尚科技年轻品牌”全速进阶。

chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

滴滴自动驾驶参加伦敦MOVE 2026大会

6月17至18日，MOVE 2026大会在英国伦敦召开，滴滴自动驾驶在会上分享了来自中国的自动驾驶落地实践。在AI技术方面，滴滴自动驾驶已实现L4级全栈核心技术的自主可控；硬件方面，与广汽埃安联合打造的新一代Robotaxi车型R2已于今年1月交付，正持续在广州和北京等地开展道路测试；在场景应用上，自去年四季度在广州、北京部分示范应用区域开启全天候载客测试以来，滴滴自动驾驶始终保持安全稳定的运行表现。

chinese_news.title: 蔚来补上“智驾课”，任少卿总结：智驾技术创新将重构竞争
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫
编辑｜李勤

6月18日，蔚来同时向两代平台车型（包含8款NT2.0平台车型、4款NT2.5平台车型，以及6款NT3.0车型）推送了最新版的世界模型，这意味着，蔚来现在能让同一套复杂的智驾代码，现在能跑在不同代际的芯片上。

软件迭代节奏被硬件绑架曾是一个困扰行业的难题。很多车企无法在不同版本、配置的车型上迭代同一款软件，这带来的结果是，很长时间内只有使用最新版本硬件的车才能用上最好的软件，老车主被背刺。

蔚来部署推理跨平台兼容

chinese_news.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

中国游戏产业正站在一个微妙的分水岭上。

一边，腾讯网易等头部大厂利用资本，以全球资源整合或漫长自研周期，向代表行业塔尖的3A单机游戏发起冲锋；另一边，以4399百奥为代表的腰部力量，在各自深耕的细分赛道里，通过成熟玩法复刻与精细化运营，稳守利润阵地。

今年夏日游戏节的发布会上，数十家全球顶尖游戏厂商轮番登台，发布了超过50款新作的最新消息。

在海外大厂普遍打出“老IP重制+续作”保守牌局中，腾讯和网易同时拿出3A级的单机产品，并肩出现在全球顶级展会的聚光灯下。

当大厂渴望用3A讲述中国故事建立全球品牌壁垒，腰部厂商则在存量市场中持续收割，一个向上押注3A，一个向下蚕食存量。这两条看似背道而驰的路，正共用着同一个起点。

01

chinese_news.title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

近日，市场监管总局联合中央网信办、国家铁路局，依法约谈携程、同程、去哪儿、飞猪、美团、智行火车票、高铁管家7家旅游出行第三方平台，直指平台在火车票销售领域存在多项不规范经营行为。

具体来看，违规行为包括不当宣传“候补帮抢”及付费选座、不当诱导用户“买长乘短”“买短乘长”，不当收集、使用用户个人信息等问题。后续监管部门将加大监管执法力度。

此次集中约谈，不仅直指OTA平台火车票业务的乱象根源，也揭开了在线旅游行业围绕出行流量展开的深层博弈。

监管收紧的背景下，传统OTA依赖的流量逻辑正在动摇，而铁路官方平台跨界拓展酒旅业务的可能性，也让整个在线出行行业迎来新一轮变数。

抢票“加速包”，OTA的“流量加速包”

每逢各大、小长假，打开OTA平台的火车票页面，“极速抢票”“候补加速”“高成功率帮抢”等标语便铺天盖地，甚至

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 on June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Bitcoin has fallen 4 consecutive days and bears control $13B options expiry; concentrated liquidity below $59k signals capitulation risk but also potential reversal point—critical 6-week test of 2026 trend.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk/Cointelegraph: 4-day BTC decline, $13B June options expiry, Saylor STRC liquidation commentary; technical levels at $59k support.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX's stock price exceed $200 by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX IPO at $135 surged 37% in first week; historic debut minted a trillionaire and triggered record leveraged ETF inflows—momentum and retail appetite remain extreme.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: SpaceX IPO surge, $1T+ valuation milestone, historic leveraged ETF positioning, Musk shareholder concentration.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates by at least 50 bps by December 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: DOJ-Trump settlement dynamics and anti-weaponization fund structure raise questions about institutional constraints on monetary policy independence; macro traders pricing in political pressure.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: DOJ rebuffs judge on anti-weaponization fund in writing; Trump $10B IRS lawsuit settlement framing.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Nvidia's stock outperform the S&P 500 by >10% through June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Memory chip crisis forcing Apple to raise prices signals supply constraints and DRAM/NAND shortage deepening—structural tailwind for NVDA and MU if crisis persists.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'unsustainable' memory shortage forcing Apple price increases; industry consensus that supply crunch extends into H2 2026.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Strait of Hormuz toll be reinstated before September 1, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: U.S.-Iran deal toll-free period creates clear deadline and oil tanker traffic surge signals geopolitical settlement; resolution hinges on whether toll-free window is extended or reverts.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: U.S.-Iran deal opens Strait, raises questions about governance after toll-free period ends; oil tanker traffic spike.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Charles Schwab's S&P 500 prediction market launch generate >$500M in notional volume by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Charles Schwab official announcements / WSJ reporting on Schwab platform trading volume
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Schwab entry into prediction markets signals mainstream financial services legitimacy; yes-or-no S&P 500 bets are highly liquid for retail, but market expectations underestimate institutional flow once live.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: WSJ/Cointelegraph reported Schwab entering prediction markets; traditional broker entry is major adoption catalyst underpriced in existing Polymarket odds.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin breach $70,000 and hold above it for 7+ consecutive days by July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko / CoinMarketCap daily BTC/USD closing prices
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Current downtrend (4-day losses) has created excessive bear sentiment; if $59k support holds and liquidations clear, 20%+ bounce is high-probability reversal play. Bull-skewed markets often underprice positive technical breaks.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Cointelegraph data cautions against overly bearish bias; concentrated liquidity at $59k is classic capitulation setup; Saylor STRC leverage events clear weak hands.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DeFi smart-contract coins (SOL, AVAX, or ADA average) recover to outperform BTC by >15% from June 1 to December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko: SOL, AVAX, ADA vs BTC total return; calculate 3-coin average return relative to BTC from June 1 open
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports smart-contract coins leading losses during BTC wilts; digital credit market leverage liquidations are purging weak hands from DeFi; post-liquidation recovery typically overshoots.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Smart-contract coins hardest hit; Strive CEO leverage liquidation narrative; once deleveraging completes, repricing of fundamentals (Solana MEV, Avalanche subnets, Cardano scaling) typically outperforms macro recovery.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Apple release a statement confirming memory chip price increases and/or delay new product launches by August 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Apple SEC filings (10-Q/10-K), earnings call transcripts (Q3 2026), or official press release via Apple Newsroom
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CEO Tim Cook's on-record 'unsustainable' memory shortage comment creates clear confirmation threshold; market has not yet priced the probability Apple formally acknowledges pricing/supply constraints in regulatory filings.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Tim Cook quote on unsustainable memory shortage; this is non-standard transparency from Apple and suggests crisis severity warranting formal disclosure.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin-denominated corporate dividend ETFs (Franklin Templeton or competitors) cross $1B in assets under management by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR filings (Fund summary pages), ETFdb.com, or Franklin Templeton official AUM disclosures
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Franklin Templeton's proposed BTC-dividend ETF targets institutional allocation (pension funds, endowments) that has been underexposed to crypto-yield; if approved by Q3 2026, adoption curve could be steep given pent-up demand.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Franklin Templeton proposes dividend-to-BTC ETFs; this is the first major asset manager formalizing crypto-yield for institutional clients; market is pricing low odds but regulatory approval likelihood is rising.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin capitulates to $57k-$59k over next 14 days, triggering forced liquidations that clear weak leverage and set up a 15-20% reversal bounce into June 2026.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 4-day BTC decline, concentrated liquidity pocket below $59k, bears hold upper hand in options expiry
Cointelegraph: Data cautions against overly bearish bias; historically, this exact setup (bear control + liquidity void) precedes sharp reversals
CoinDesk: Saylor STRC selloff commentary suggests forced selling from leveraged positions, not fundamental de-rating
investment_theses.counter_view: Macro headwinds (Fed hawkishness, Trump-Iran geopolitical escalation post-ceasefire failure, tech memory crisis) could extend bear pressure through Q3 2026; BTC correlation to risk assets rising.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot at $62k-$63k or via BTC June 2026 call options (ATM-OTM); hedge with short S&P 500 futures (SPY puts) to isolate crypto liquidation event.

investment_theses.thesis: Memory chip shortage (DRAM/NAND) extends into Q4 2026 and forces Apple, nvidia, and hyperscalers into price-raising cycles; MU outperforms semis complex by 20%+ YTD.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Tim Cook explicitly labels shortage 'unsustainable,' signaling willingness to raise prices rather than accept margin compression
CNBC: Apple taking rare step of raising prices suggests supply inelasticity; if Apple is raising prices, smaller OEMs have no negotiating power

36Kr (Chinese source): Anta releasing 'fold paper' shoe technology suggests consumer hardware makers are being squeezed on materials and turning to design innovation as margin defense—parallel to chip shortage dynamics
investment_theses.counter_view: New capacity from Samsung, SK Hynix, and Intel comes online faster than consensus forecasts; memory contract pricing stabilizes by Q3 2026, eroding supply premium.
investment_theses.expression: Long Micron (MU) vs. short NVDA (ratio trade); or long Memory ETF (IPHI or comparable) vs. short Semiconductor ETF (SMH); outright long MU calls (6-month maturity, strike $120-$130).

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX post-IPO momentum exhausts in Q2-Q3 2026 as retail leverage unwinds from historic leveraged ETF inflows; stock corrects 20-30% by September 30, 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 37% first-week surge is third-order reflection of retail leveraged ETF positioning, not fundamentals; historically, such euphoria reverses within 90-180 days
CNBC: Musk's $1T+ stake concentration creates overhang risk if markets correct or Musk faces legal/regulatory pressure on other fronts (DOJ, Trump political entanglement)
Hacker News: Hyundai acquires Boston Dynamics (robotics/autonomous), signaling competition intensifying in robotics/space-adjacent sectors; SpaceX's valuation assumes monopoly-grade margins
investment_theses.counter_view: SpaceX Starship cadence accelerates, Starlink profit inflection arrives sooner than priced, government space contracts surge (DoD, NASA)—all justify maintained premium.
investment_theses.expression: Short SpaceX via leveraged inverse ETFs (if available) or outright put spreads; long call spreads on traditional aerospace (RTX, LMT) to rotate sector exposure away from SpaceX concentration.

investment_theses.thesis: U.S.-Iran Strait of Hormuz toll-free period creates binary volatility in crude; odds of toll reinstatement by Sept 2026 are >50%, creating asymmetric oil upside ($75-$85/bbl by August 2026).
supporting_signals: CNBC: Toll-free period creates explicit deadline; oil tanker traffic surge signals market belief in sustainability, but geopolitical risk (Israel-Hezbollah clashes, Trump administration pressure) could trigger sudden reinstatement
BBC: Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire followed by continued Lebanon strikes suggests fragility of broader regional settlement; U.S.-Iran deal durability is questionable
BBC: Italy's Meloni public clash with Trump over Iran narrative shows alliance fracturing; bilateral disputes could unwind strategic rationale for keeping Strait open
investment_theses.counter_view: Biden administration (if re-elected or succeeded by similar) doubles down on diplomacy; toll reinstatement is delayed or canceled. Alternatively, Saudi overproduction and global recession fears cap oil at $65-$70/bbl.
investment_theses.expression: Long crude oil (WTI or Brent futures, June-July 2026 contracts); long energy sector ETF (XLE); or long-dated oil call spreads (Aug/Sept $75 calls).

investment_theses.thesis: Charles Schwab prediction market launch legitimizes retail participation in event-driven betting; Polymarket and Kalshi volumes compress as Schwab captures retail flow, but TAO (Bittensor) and PENGU (Pudgy Penguins) NFT-utility tokens rally on speculation that on-chain identity/prediction markets grow.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk/Cointelegraph: Schwab entering prediction markets signals institutional/regulatory blessing; removes friction for retail to bet on macro events via familiar brokerage
Crypto trending: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) and Bittensor (TAO) top movers; both have identity/community components relevant to decentralized prediction market infrastructure

Hacker News: ATProto discussion (There are no instances in ATProto, score 263) signals growing interest in decentralized identity—foundational for open-source prediction markets to compete with Schwab
investment_theses.counter_view: Schwab's centralized, regulated prediction market cannibalizes retail flow away from crypto-native platforms; TAO and PENGU are purely sentiment-driven and lack fundamental catalyst beyond hype.
investment_theses.expression: Long PENGU and TAO (spot or perpetual futures); long Polymarket PCS token (if liquid); hedge with short SPY or long VIX to isolate prediction-market adoption thesis from macro risk.
